global.description: The ad features a bold orange background with clear messaging about food delivery.
global.main_message: Promoting food delivery service with a special offer.

elements.label: Orange gradient background
elements.description: A vibrant orange gradient background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: FreshDash logo
elements.description: Bold, black text displaying 'FreshDash' prominently at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Two stacked rectangles
elements.description: Two vertically stacked rectangles with rounded corners, resembling a delivery box.

elements.label: Cravings message
elements.description: White text stating 'Your cravings, delivered' in a clear, modern font.

elements.label: Delivery offer
elements.description: Smaller white text below the main message indicating 'Free delivery over $15'.

elements.label: Delivery box icon
elements.description: A small icon representing a delivery box, located at the top left corner.

elements.label: Arrow icon
elements.description: A small right-facing arrow icon located at the top right corner.

elements.label: Learn more button
elements.description: A prominent button at the bottom with the text 'Learn more' in white on an orange background.
elements.text_content: Your cravings, delivered Free delivery over $15
